steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank is a pronoun that serves as the subject of 'represented.' It must agree in number and person with its antecedent. The noun it refers back to is 'aesthetic' — a singular, third-person noun.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "these": plural demonstrative pronoun; 'aesthetic' is singular. ✗
  • "they": plural third-person pronoun; does not match singular 'aesthetic.' ✗
  • "we": first-person plural; introduces a speaker not present in the sentence. ✗
  • "it": singular third-person pronoun; correctly refers to 'aesthetic' and fits the clause 'it represented a departure from traditional painting.' ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
